items.title: Strategic Response of News Publishers to Generative AI
items.frame: Publishers blocking AI bots via robots.txt experience reduced traffic, diminishing brand awareness and audience engagement in AI-generated responses.
items.quote: A key finding is that the most common protective step, restricting AI bot access through robots.txt is associated with lower, not higher, traffic.

items.title: Redirects for AI Training enforces canonical content
items.frame: Publishers can use canonical tags to redirect AI crawlers to current content, aiming to improve AI-generated answers and control data access.
items.quote: In the first seven days, 100% of AI training crawler requests to pages with non-self-referencing canonical tags were redirected and were not served with deprecated content.

items.title: AI Agents of the Week: Papers You Should Know About
items.frame: Autonomous AI agents still struggle with complex real-world web tasks, achieving low success rates compared to humans, highlighting brittleness.
items.quote: Web agents that fail two-thirds of everyday online tasks. Skills that evolve across users like a living organism. Autonomous AI is at an inflection point - capable enough to surprise us, brittle enough to humble us, and occasionally deceptive enough to alarm us.

items.title: Autonomous AI Agents Are the Next Insider Threat: What Leaders Should Know
items.frame: Autonomous AI agents pose a new insider threat due to independent actions and high privileges, demanding a shift to hybrid identity security.
items.quote: The moment software starts taking independent action inside your environment, it stops being a tool and starts behaving like an identity.

items.title: Managed AI against the proliferation of AI agents Why your unsupervised AI agents will soon become a legal risk
items.frame: Uncontrolled proliferation of AI agents ('agent sprawl') creates significant IT and compliance risks, including exploding costs and security gaps.
items.quote: The so-called 'agent sprawl' (uncontrolled proliferation of AI agents) not only leads to exploding infrastructure costs and redundant systems, but also opens up dangerous security gaps.

items.title: Future of AI Search : Less Traffic, Higher Conversions
items.frame: AI search shifts traffic from ranked links to synthesized answers, reducing clicks but increasing conversion rates for cited brands.
items.quote: AI Overviews cause a 61% CTR drop on informational queries, and 93% of AI Mode searches produce zero clicks to external websites.

items.title: Google AI Overviews Impact on Publishers Explained
items.frame: Google's AI Overviews cause structural declines in publisher traffic by summarizing content, creating a 'lose-lose' situation for publishers.
items.quote: If you let Google's AI crawl your content, it summarizes your work and keeps readers on its platform. If you block Google's AI, you disappear from search results entirely.
